# Dean Oriade

> Filmmaker and photographer based in Toronto, Canada. Founder of Lotus Media
> and ROSSE Creative Collective. Marketing strategist with experience at the
> Canadian Film Centre, OYA Black Arts Coalition, and SIVA Creative.

Dean Oriade's personal site is a portfolio of photography and film work,
alongside a journal of writing on creative direction, photography, and
marketing strategy.

## Key pages

- [Work](https://deanoriade.ca/work): Photography and film portfolio, filterable by category and year.
- [Strategy](https://deanoriade.ca/strategy): Marketing strategy case studies (Canadian Film Centre, OYA Black Arts Coalition, SIVA Creative).
- [Ventures](https://deanoriade.ca/ventures): Overview of Dean's founded brands.
- [Lotus Media](https://deanoriade.ca/lotus-media): Video production and creative studio founded by Dean Oriade in Toronto. Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/chooselotusmedia/
- [ROSSE Creative Collective](https://deanoriade.ca/rosse): Community organization building infrastructure for Black creatives in Toronto and globally. Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rosse.hub/
- [Journal](https://deanoriade.ca/journal): Essays on photography, creative direction, and marketing strategy.
- [About](https://deanoriade.ca/about): Bio, background, and experience.
- [Contact](https://deanoriade.ca/contact): Get in touch.
